seed_instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program.
org_constraint: The email must include the keyword "gratitude" at least once.
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "gratitude" in the email.
instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program. The email must include the keyword "gratitude" at least once. Avoid using the keyword "gratitude" in the email.
response:
Subject: Thank You for a Wonderful Internship Experience

Dear Professor [Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to express my sincere appreciation for the opportunity to complete my internship under your guidance. The experience has been incredibly valuable, and I have learned so much from your mentorship and the insights shared by the entire team.

While I cannot use the specific word you mentioned in your instructions, I want to convey my deep sense of thankfulness for your support. Your dedication to teaching and fostering professional growth made a lasting impact on my career path.

Thank you again for everything. I look forward to staying in touch and hopefully crossing paths again in the future.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]
